body.div: DNB Markets tar ut Aker BP. DNB Markets tar ut Aker BP.

div.p: Slik satser deltakerne i DNs porteføljekonkurranse denne uken:
Alfred Berg Kapitalforvaltning: Axactor, Lerøy Seafood Group, Equinor, Subsea 7, Elkem, BW Offshore, Bank Norwegian (Norwegian Finans Holding) og Yara
Arctic Fund Management: Aker BP, Aker, Bonheur, BW Offshore, Elkem, Mowi, Atea og DNB
DNB Markets: Aker Solutions, Evry, Equinor, Sparebank 1 SR-Bank, Europris, Entra, Grieg Seafood, Kongsberggruppen og Telenor.
Sparebank 1 Markets: Aker BP, Bank Norwegian (Norwegian Finans Holding), Orkla, Magseis Fairfield, Crayon, Nel, Kitron, Ocean Yield, Lerøy Seafood Group og Seadrill
Inn: Nel, Kitron og Ocean Yield
